theme_and_archetype.theme: Dark Mode Default (with Light Mode fallback)
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Oracle, courtroom, reference library, intelligence dossier
principles: The verdict, the map, the proof - NO chat-wrapper UI.
Single-click action to output. High authority, high precision.
Editorial reading column vs technical data grid.
Visual tension through aggressive asymmetry and generous negative space.

typography.strategy: Dual-type tension: Editorial Serif for narrative/drama + Geometric Sans for UI + Monospace for data precision.

hierarchy.hero_h1: font-serif text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-paper-100
hierarchy.section_h2: font-sans text-3xl md:text-4xl tracking-tight text-paper-100 font-medium

textures_and_surfaces.noise_overlay: Implement CSS-based grain using an SVG data URI or minimal background noise (opacity 2-5%) to give the 'dossier' and 'parchment' feel. DO NOT use generic gradients.
textures_and_surfaces.borders: 1px sharp borders. No soft shadows. Use harsh inset shadows or rigid box-shadows if needed.
textures_and_surfaces.cards: Go cardless or use strictly rectangular, flat containers with subtle 1px border. No rounding (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The 'Bento' Protocol for Dashboards & Atlas, asymmetric overlapping grids for Landing.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous. Use p-8 or p-12 in major containers.
layout_and_spacing.editorial_column: For textual outputs (Advocacy Studio, Briefs), restrict max-width to 65ch (prose), left-align the block in an asymmetrical layout.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, dense content. Never center-align body text.

motion_and_microinteractions.verdict_stamp: Hard, fast scaling animation (scale 1.5 to 1.0) with subtle screen shake or border flash when a verdict is generated, simulating a legal stamp.
motion_and_microinteractions.map_dots: Slow, pulsing animation on map markers (scale 1 to 1.5, opacity 1 to 0) indicating live monitoring.
motion_and_microinteractions.reveals: Staggered fade-up (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0) for data lists and citations.
motion_and_microinteractions.click_states: Satisfying 'snap' or indent effect on buttons/chips.

component_strategies.buttons: Rectangular, sharp edges. Primary uses verdict_gold. Secondary is transparent with strong border. Hover explicitly sets text/bg color.
component_strategies.inputs: Flat, bottom-border only or rigid rectangular boxes. No rounded corners.
component_strategies.badges: Monospace text, rigid borders, background matches signal color at 10% opacity.
component_strategies.citations: Clickable [S#] elements. Should look like hyperlink brackets or small superscript badges. Highlight text dynamically based on verification status.

iconography.restrictions: NO emojis anywhere. Keep icons sparse and strictly functional (e.g., globe, scale, map-pin, file-text, shield).

specific_feature_guidelines.landing_page: Hero: Bold typographic statement (Newsreader). Counter animations (Framer Motion) for chunks, latency, etc. No generic dashboard mockups. Focus on the raw intelligence vibe.
specific_feature_guidelines.conflict_atlas: Visual Hero. Use react-simple-maps or Mapbox (dark style). Countries map strictly to Signal Colors. Drawer slides from right with monospace data and citations.
specific_feature_guidelines.citation_forensics: Split-pane. Left: Raw input text. Right: Processed view. Use <mark> elements with specific background colors (red/green) for n-gram matches. Display % circles.
specific_feature_guidelines.advocacy_studio: Left: Form. Right: Print-ready editorial layout (black text on off-white paper_editorial background). Should physically look like a printed memorandum.
specific_feature_guidelines.council_of_models: 3 narrow vertical columns. Disagreements highlighted using text-underline or background highlight. Meta-judge banner spans top.
specific_feature_guidelines.research_console: Tabs for personas. Main chat interface MUST not look like typical bubbles. Use a linear dossier log format (Timestamp, Persona, Output). Right sidebar for Citation Audit.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/Tailwind for Landing/Marketing layouts. Heavily customize Shadcn for the Dashboard/Console elements.
Strip all rounding from Shadcn components (`radius: 0`).
Implement the CSS grain texture in `index.css` as a global pseudo-element overlay (pointer-events-none).
Configure Tailwind with custom fonts (Geist, Newsreader, JetBrains Mono) and the strict color palette provided.
Ensure all outputs (especially the Forensics and Advocacy Studio) feel like definitive, authoritative documents, NOT casual chat responses.
Add print styles (`@media print`) for the Advocacy Studio output.
